programme.desc: Thousands of refugees were sleeping rough at Budapest's Keleti station, waiting for trains to take them to western Europe. Then, they just got up and walked. Guardian journalist and filmmaker John Domokos went with them, every step of the way. This is the story of one Syrian family, and those who came out to help

programme.desc: The secret world of Asian drag queens | Oklahoma rodeo: 'I can be gay and I can be a cowboy'

programme.title: Inside the strange world of NFTs
programme.desc: Celebrities, sports people, politicians – anyone and everyone seems to be getting into NFTs. These non-fungible tokens (NFTs) have changed the business of buying, selling and owning art and digital property, and 'collectibles' like 'Bored Apes' have sold for millions online. Many say they are buying these images to be part of a community and because they love the art. But, in reality, how much of this is a speculative bubble that could soon burst?

programme.title: Justice for Adama: the family protesting against police brutality in France
programme.desc: Adama Traoré died in police custody last year. His family's struggle for justice has put police brutality back under the spotlight in France, and his older sister Assa is leading the battle to find out the truth about his death. Iman Amrani looks at how this story paved the way for the recent riots in France, following the alleged rape of a young man called Theo by a police officer. *The figure of 15 deaths in custody every year quoted in the film is based on campaign groups and media tallies. No official figures for deaths in custody are recorded in France.

programme.title: Run the code: is algorave the future of dance music? | The black art: wet plate collodion photography
programme.desc: Run the code: is algorave the future of dance music? | The black art: wet plate collodion photography

programme.title: The Tower next door
programme.desc: In June 2017 residents of the Silchester estate woke to discover Grenfell Tower engulfed in flames, witnessing a terrifying national tragedy unfolding on their doorstep. The tower bore a striking resemblance to their own. The victims were people they knew, people from all walks of life who, like them, made a home for themselves high up above the clamour of the city. Faced with an uncertain future, the residents of the tower next door are fighting to rebuild their community.

programme.title: After Windrush – Paulette Wilson's visit to Jamaica, 50 years on
programme.desc: A letter from the British government classifying Paulette Wilson as an illegal immigrant shook her sense of identity and belonging. ‘Hostile environment' policies years in the making meant that Wilson and other victims of the Windrush scandal had their right to residency in the UK called into question. She had been detained for a week pending imminent deportation though she had done nothing wrong. It was devastating, but luckily she was released before she was deported.

programme.title: Can women save sumo? The crossroads facing Japan's national sport
programme.desc: The ancient Japanese sport of sumo is in well-documented crisis. Years of controversy and scandal have hurt the sport's ability to attract new talent. But new energy is brewing in Tokyo's Ryōgoku district, where the sport is slowly adapting to life in the 21st century, and where - despite being banned from the professional ring itself - women are flocking to watch it like never before. Will it be enough to save Japan's national sport in the 21st century?

programme.title: Killing Gävle
programme.desc: In the small city of Gävle, northern Sweden, there is an annual fight between local custodians and mischievous pagans for the spirit of Christmas. Each year since 1966, business owners have paid for a 13-metre (40ft) effigy of a goat to be made of straw and displayed in the central square from the first day of Advent. In 37 of those years, the goat has been burned down or damaged by shadowy outsiders, sometimes within a few hours of going up.

programme.title: The new populism
programme.desc: An investigation into the rise of a global phenomenon. How we combed leader's speeches to gauge populist rise.

programme.title: Baby Bust
programme.desc: Leah Green travels across Europe to find out why fewer babies are being born, and what it means for our future

programme.title: The Night Wolves: Putin's motorbiking militia of Luhansk
programme.desc: Production Year: 2016. The Night Wolves are Russia's largest and most notorious biker gang, fiercely loyal to Vladimir Putin, and say they are motivated by Christianity and patriotism. Their base in Luhansk, east Ukraine, resembles a set from Mad Max. Inside their stronghold, the Night Wolves open up about the families they left behind.

programme.title: The Hour of Lynching
programme.desc: Rakbar, a Muslim dairy farmer, was murdered by a Hindu mob who thought he was taking a cow to be slaughtered for meat. His wife, Asmeena, must undergo an intense iddat (mourning in purdah) and their daughter, Sahila, is forced to abandon school to take care of the household. While the family falls apart, the hate machinery of rightwing Hindu nationalists – politicians and lynch mobs – works overtime to legitimise the killing.

programme.title: We swam to Hong Kong for freedom half a century ago. What now? | The Chagos Islanders taking back their birthplace
programme.desc: We swam to Hong Kong for freedom half a century ago. What now? | The Chagos Islanders taking back their birthplace

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: Traffic officer Hugh McKirdy becomes starstruck as he and his partner Surjit Singh respond to an incident involving Michelle McManus.

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: While helping a blind man do some shopping, Volunteer Officer Ken Beattie discovers there's more to him than meets the eye. Something that also applies to the old pensioner that Officers McLaren and Fletcher rush to rescue.

programme.title: Baywatch, Season 4
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep them both alive.

programme.title: Baywatch, Season 4
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results.

programme.desc: A very ill Sam Tyler has reason to believe that he's been given an overdose of medication in 2006. While struggling with this, he's called into CID to assist with a troubling kidnapping case.

programme.desc: Tim is forced to take Marcus to work with him, which risks his MI5 officer status Philip and Judith go through a role playing exercise.

programme.title: Spy
programme.desc: The Examiner cherry-picks Tim and Caitlin to star in a recruitment video, and Marcus and Chris join forces for a TV quiz.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate's mother puts the pressure on Kate to “cut the leash” on her old dog, Olly. Meanwhile, Frankie misreads Anne's therapeutic advice, while Anne's daughter begins to bond with Mean Nanny.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is shamed for her choice of porn – yes, porn. Jenny makes a bold move with Marvin, and Frankie digs for the root of her intimacy issues.

programme.title: Blue Carbon
programme.desc: Blue carbon could be one of the most important tools in the fight against climate change - but you've probably never heard of it. Follow Grammy-nominated music producer, DJ, and biologist, Jayda Guy as she invites us to listen to nature and to the communities fighting to tackle our climate crisis.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The Leverage crew goes after a Serbian adoption agency that's scamming money from desperate American couples looking to adopt needy war orphans. To entrap the ringleader and rescue the children, the team must hijack the local production of an independent horror movie.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Hi-tech tracking technology reveals where stolen items are taken. A DVD player is stolen from a donation bag outside a London charity shop, and the tracking data reveals that the thief lives nearby.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Hi-tech tracking technology reveals where stolen items are taken. When a young woman is robbed of her laptop, the tracker reveals its curious journey around London's theatre district.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: The undercover thief tracker team use GPS technology to trace a criminal who steals a tablet computer. A pub landlord in Bristol tracks the criminals who try to steal his caravan and a young woman turns detective to find her stolen phone.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Reality series following stolen possessions. The undercover thief tracker team uses GPS technology to follow a criminal who steals a camera and passes it to an accomplice.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Crime bosses and drug dealers living the high life have their assets stripped by financial investigators and then sold at auction.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: One of Britain's largest ever drug seizures leads to a Proceeds of Crime auction, and elite financial investigators hunt down suspected drug dealers.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: A gang is foiled trying to smuggle deadly weapons in to the UK, then their boat is sold at a Proceeds of Crime auction.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Siberian Education
programme.desc: Two criminals become fierce enemies when they find themselves on opposite sides of their ruthless moral code.

programme.desc: The competition heats up as Hollywood Week begins for Idol hopefuls.

programme.title: American Idol

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.desc: The competition continues at Castle Hill Guesthouse in North Devon. Can newcomers to the B and B business Emma and Alistair Mundell win over their rival professionals with their newly renovated B and B and deal with a one very critical guest?

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Four more homeowners get a chance to peek around each other's properties in the north east of England, beginning with Andria's Georgian farmhouse. Customer service worker Holly has put her stamp of hearts and words on her new build town house, while animal lover Vivienne opens up her Victorian school house in Durham which she shares with three horses and four dogs. Housewife Tracey also has a detached Edwardian house with a menagerie of animals, including Benji the Shetland pony.

programme.title: May the Best House Win
programme.desc: Who will win today's cash prize in Nottingham? Motorcycle loving Julie shows off her modern detached home which has a girls only pad at the bottom of the garden. Self confessed clutter lover Claire plays host in her shabby chic 1930s home. Civil servant Pauline opens up her Victorian terrace party house, and Latvian lady Irita opens the doors to her centuries old waterside cottage.

programme.title: Million Pound Movers: Million Pound Movers
programme.desc: With the number of millionaire homeowners rising, the high-end removals industry in the UK is booming. Moving house is said to be one of the most stressful life events, and for those blessed with the finer things in life, the stakes are even higher. Million Pound Movers goes behind closed doors to meet the wealthy clients moving priceless objects, plus the firms tasked with completing the job where one mistake could cost thousands. For these moving firms, demanding clients, unusual requests, and expensive art and furniture all make for a high-risk, yet entertaining business.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Goretti Foreau and her French husband, Eric, have decided that now that their older kids are in college, they want a lifestyle change and so they are moving lock, stock and barrel from Dublin city to the rolling hills of Rathrum, Co. Wicklow. They've bought an old farmhouse and agricultural outbuildings that need significant and extensive restoration work to become habitable.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.sub-title: Belvelly Tower House, Cobh, Co Cork.
programme.desc: Belfast born Garry and Anne Wilson have lived and worked in the UK all of their adult lives. They have always wanted a base in Ireland and in 2016 they were in the market for a restoration project and came across Belvelly Tower House in Cobh Co Cork.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Dublin born Fiona Kelly has serious ambition. Having purchased a dilapidated Georgian terraced house in the heart of Phibsborough in north Dublin, she has a mammoth project on her hands. With slanted door frames, crooked floors and a tumbling roof, Fiona and her building contractor friend Philip, have taken on a building on the brink of collapse. Once an impressive townhouse for a well-to-do tradesman, Fiona's house has been witness to the passing fortunes and misfortunes of Dublin over the centuries, and was occupied as a tenement home right up to the 1960s.

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: With three children all under the age of 5, Belinda and Lorcan Carpenter have decided to convert three farmyard barns into their dream family home. Set in the picturesque hills of the Wicklow Carlow border on the grounds of Belinda's childhood home Munny House, the barns need extensive renovation and conversion work in order to transform the dilapidated donkey house into a bespoke family home. Belinda has many a vivid memory of her childhood in Munny Farm playing in the stables, grooming horses, and feeding the beloved donkey Ned. She now hopes to create many more fond memories not just for her, but for her husband Lorcan and the three children, with a budget of €250,000.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Many simple questions about the fatal night of August 31st have never been asked. By the end not only Princess Diana but also Dodi Al Fayed and the driver Henri Paul were dead. First, police blamed the paparazzi for causing the accident. They had been "buzzing round the car like flies." Then 48 hours later they blamed the driver of the Mercedes, Henri Paul. He was said to be three times over the drink limit. This compelling program seeks to answer the many questions overlooked by the enquiry and to uncover what really happened the night Diana died.

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Trying to impress a girl, Jack convinces Bumblebee to help him win a street race.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Arcee takes Jack along on a seemingly routine mission.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime becomes infected with a Decepticon plague.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron remains a fixture inside Bumblebee's mind and manipulates his actions back at Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids accidently become stuck inside an alternate dimension during a GroundBridge malfunction.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A lagoon of Electrum is discovered in a remote forest untouched by man or machine.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Comet Is Coming!: Papa's note to the Smurfs about viewing a comet is delivered torn. The Smurfs read only the first part and think their world is coming to an end. They plan how to spend their last day until Papa returns to clear up the misunderstanding and assure them that they are safe.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Loss Of Smurfs: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Gargamel's Giant: The evil wizard Gargamel wants to create a monster. A horrible, gigantic creature, an awesome being that is going to destroy all the Smurfs! But Gargamel makes a slight mistake, and the result is going to astonish him and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fake Smurf: Hogatha turns herself into a Smurf, plotting revenge on the little people for destroying her magic locket. Papa Smurf outwits her and banishes her from the forest once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All The Smurf's A Stage: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: Alarming Smurfs
programme.desc: Feeling unwanted, the Smurflings run away. They take things to remind them of home, so the Smurfs think there's a thief in their midst. Brainy tries to catch the thief by installing smurfler alarms. The alarms cause a ruckus that draws the Smurflings home, where Papa tells them they are wanted.

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Incredible Shrinking Wizard: Gargamel has thrown in his slime pond so much poisonous muck that the water becomes enchanted and Gargamel, after falling in, suddenly finds himself much smaller that he would wish. Actually he is going to be so small that Papa Smurf will save him!

programme.title: Squirrels
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children go for a walk to find some red squirrels. The Teletubbies are playing a hiding game. Where are they? Can Noo-Noo find them?

programme.title: Stop & Go
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Strawberry Picking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having some Tubby Custard when they stop to watch some children who are going strawberry picking.

programme.title: Swan
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.

programme.title: Swim with Stephanie
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun falling over. The Teletubbies watch some children go swimming with Stephanie.

programme.title: The Beach
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical sound for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children take their dog and a ball to the beach.

programme.title: Throwing
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to run and do exercises. The Tubbies watch a girl and a boy throwing a ball. Then they play a game together with the ball.

programme.title: Tweet Tweet
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having their Tubby Toast when a voice trumpet brings them a message. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall and some children go looking for birds in the park.

programme.title: Urban Birds
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Wake Up
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a game before watching some children playing a game with Alex Pascall. The Teletubbies have fun playing the game of waking and sleeping, before Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Walk in the Woods
programme.desc: Laa-Laa fells like giving all the other Teletubbies a big hug. But where's Tinky Winky? The Teletubbies watch some children who are going for a walk in the woods.

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: Po looks after the Teletubbies' favourite things. The Teletubbies have fun watching some children making shadows.

programme.title: Sophie Art
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into Home Hill. They watch some children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: When the girls decide to teach their new friend about working together, some of the other bears feel left out.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: When Love-a-Lot suggests that Harmony perform a concert for Care-a-lot, Harmony's inner diva comes out.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: It's time for Bedtime Bear to give his friends an inside look into his nightly duties!

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Funshine feels lost after losing his badge until Grizzle comes to destroy Care-a-Lot - with Funshine's badge!

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Oopsy wants to participate in the Care-a-lot Grand Prix, but he seems to be plagued with bad luck.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: McKenna has invited everyone on a special bike ride, but Grumpy doesn't know how to ride a bike.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Tenderheart and Funshine are mad at each other, but that changes when Grizzle strikes with a Forget-Me-Ray!

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Care-A-Lot's birthday is put on hold when Beastly captures Hugs and Tugs and the Care Bears must rescue them.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Grumpy helps a boy gain confidence and must build up his own as he accepts the challenge to fight No Heart.

programme.title: Care Bears

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Corneil and Bernie are in the music store when Corneil wanders off. Bernie thinks Corneil has been kidnapped when he sees a similar looking dog being driven off in a car. John and Beth call the police, who promise to lock the culprit up behind bars. When Corneil returns home from the store, Bernie is worried he'll be sent to prison. He comes up with a plan to ensure he is made to look like a hero… until Corneil makes a few minor changes to it!

programme.title: The Smurfs: All's Smurfy That Ends Smurfy
programme.desc: Gargamel's theft of the Fairies' gold almost brings a state of war between the Fairies and the Smurfs.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Bernie asks Corneil to apply on his behalf to take part in the TV adventure game show “Jungle Panic”. He is accepted, on the condition that he brings Corneil with him! Will Corneil and Bernie survive a week on a desert island and can Corneil outsmart the other competitors without getting caught on camera?

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Alien Kind
programme.desc: Bernie is determined to prove to the other kids at school that aliens really do exist and persuades Corneil to dress up as one. When Romeo tells the whole school about his encounter with an extra terrestrial the next day, Bernie is furious to be left out of the limelight and takes things just that little bit too far…

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie
programme.desc: Corneil has fallen head over paws in love with Beauty, the poodle that lives downstairs. He tries to convince Bernie to go out on a date with Caroline, the poodle's owner so he can spend time with his love, but to no avail. That is, until Bernie sees Caroline once she has had a make over, but suddenly Corneil isn't so sure about his feelings for Beauty.

programme.title: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: 1920s Vienna. Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship and adventure. On Christmas Eve, Mary's beloved Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll. Later that night, Mary's imagination brings the doll to life. Introducing himself as "NC," he takes her on a wondrous journey through a stunning dimension where toys assume human form and everything appears ten times larger. But danger lurks.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Easter

programme.title: The Academy of Magic

Aura is no ordinary young girl - she is gifted with magical powers. When a mysterious creature leads her to Montrose, a magic academy for children with extraordinary powers, Aura and her friends soon she learn that the school has a secret that she must uncover to protect herself and her friends.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 2 of 5: When Synapse threatens to spray Captain Muscles with a serum that will exacerbate his faults, Sienna, caught up in the film, falls and causes a magical short-circuit.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 3 of 5: The potion and Captain Muscles cross through the screen. Hit by the serum, Sienna writhes around and then flees into the forest, growling.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E24
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E25
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E26
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E27
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E28
programme.desc: The finals have finally arrived and BBA Revolution gets ready to face the Blitzkrieg Boys in a heated battle. But before that can happen, a routine check-up of Tyson's Beyblade turns up a faulty gear assembly, which needs to be repaired!

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E29
programme.desc: Daichi and Tala have both been thrown from the dish at the same time, resulting in a tie game. Because they are in no condition for a rematch, Mr. Dickenson rules that the next match will determine the new tournament Champion.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E32
programme.desc: When Yuma's buddies can't stop bickering, it's time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner... including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E33
programme.desc: A dangerous new Barian enemy arrives, and he's bringing one of his world's most powerful weapons to take down Yuma and Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E34
programme.desc: Mizar batters Yuma to his breaking point... until a surprise duelist steps in to take down Mizar and go claw-to-claw with his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E36
programme.desc: Let's get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian's Battlin' Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E37
programme.desc: It's Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito's attacks, or will this Barian's fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E38
programme.desc: Girag's got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 220: Legendary Fisherman Part 2
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 221: Double Duel Part 1
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.desc: Lucas wakes up in the middle of the night. How long can a night alone last? / Lucas tries to beat Bodhi at Hide and Seek.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of Esmeralda the Snake
programme.desc: A neat & tidy snake regrets her kind offer of a shared burrow when Herbert the Warthog moves in. Disaster strikes and they are both made homeless. Only then do they appreciate what they had together.

programme.title: HeyKids: Three Little Pigs / The Ugly Duckling
programme.desc: The Three Little Pigs cartoon is based on an European fairy tale about three little pigs who built three houses and lived happily... until a Big Bad Wolf appeared.

programme.desc: Groove thinks there can't be a better way of saying hello than giving his tail a good old wagga-wagga - but how do the Tiddlypeeps say hello?

programme.desc: The Cadets are in the middle of a seal-saving operation when they are attacked by the Snow Ecco. Turns out, it is being controlled by none other than Esme. The Cadets must put their heads together to stop Esme and her evil plan.

programme.desc: Bada wants to climb a tree, Abby wants to go to the pumpkin patch, and Mipi wants to pick grapes. However, they can't go out in the storm, so Mimi comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee: Hello Hello / One Little Finger / Skidamarink
programme.desc: Welcome to Sing Along With Tobee! In this very first episode, Tobee and Caitie teach you a super simple hello song! Join them each episode as they sing and dance to classic nursery rhymes and kids songs. / Caitie and Tobee sing one of their favorite kids songs, One Little Finger. It's super simple and super fun. It's also great for learning new parts of the body vocabulary! / Tobee makes a card for his dad's birthday but he wants to give him something else. So Caitie teaches him Skidamarink, the perfect song to sing on a birthday, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, Mother's Day, or any other day you'd like to tell someone how special they are!

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Thank You Scribblies

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Sidewalk Art
programme.desc: While drawing with Chalk, Pinkalicious begins to tell her friends an epic story about Puddles the poodle and Splish-Splash the cat.

programme.title: Road Rangers: Ambulance Donna is Here / Frank-In-Style
programme.desc: Road Rangers are a group of super heroes comprising of five street vehicles a police car, fire truck, ambulance, tow truck and garbage truck that fight crime and strive hard to keep their city safe! Call Donna, the cutest cartoon ambulance, if you've hurt yourself and she will be there in a jiffy to save the day. Sing and dance along to this car cartoon song just about Donna! / Frank is back with this funny silly antics in trying to become something that he is not! Watch as he learns all about self-confidence and learning to love oneself as you are in this fun filled kids episode with his friends tractor, ambulance, car, bike, fire engine, monster truck, garbage truck, loader, excavator, dumper, digger, tow truck, crane, helicopter and more.

programme.title: Caitie's Classroom: Wonderful Wind
programme.desc: Whoosh! Wind is an amazing kind of weather and we have lots of things to explore! Join Caitie in the classroom to experiment with a wind tunnel and see what toys we can blow away using wind. The wind can be used for all kinds of things, like making strange-shaped monsters with paint, and for making electricity on the wind farm we visit on our field trip. It's a windy day inside the classroom!

programme.title: Cry Babies Magic Tears: The Pear Monster / The Little Worm
programme.desc: Ella is this month's Best Harvester and to celebrate she invites all of her friends for a super smoothie. All the Cry Babies are on their way to the beach when Ella, along with Nana, take several smoothies and piles them in her arms, but... when she tries to walk, loses balance and all the smoothies fall on her! One hits her in the eye leaving a smoothie-shaped bruise. When the other Cry Babies arrive to the beach, they ask what has happened to her eye. Ella gets nervous and starts lying telling the story of how the Pear Monster has tried to attack her but she knew how to scare it. Will the rest of the Cry Babies believe this story or maybe someone might have witnessed what really happened? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story! / The Cry Babies Tutti Frutti's are collecting apples when, suddenly, they find a worm in one of them. The babies want the worm to leave the piece of fruit, but it hypnotises Angie and makes her believe that she now has to live in the apple. The other Cry Babies have no idea what is going on: Angie's behaviour is really strange and she is always together with the worm. When the other Cry Babies realise the worm is hypnotising their friend, Angie explains that the family of Gusi, the worm, need a home. Will the Cry Babies help Angie and her new friend the worm? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story!

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow: Happy Moo Year / To The North Pole
programme.desc: The Cow family prepares for New Year celebration and Granny's and Grandpa's arrival. / It's winter time. In their country house Boh and Zoh get a postcard from their Granny and Grandpa from the North Pole. Boh gets an idea to have an expedition to the North Pole. He gets ready for it – he exercises, runs cross country.

programme.desc: Today Kidi takes you to the fortified castle of Guédelon to find out how the kings and queens of the Middle Ages lived! He will paint and talk to the castle workers. Let's go back in time!

programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.desc: Roblox fanatic Mackenzie Turner is known for her comedic and exuberant Brookhaven and Adopt Me videos!

programme.title: KidCity

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and takes off without a trace. Leaving Mexico for Los Angeles to find the baby's mother, Valentin ends up finding a new home for himself and his newfound daughter. An unlikely father figure, Valentin raises Maggie for six years, while also establishing himself as one of Hollywood's top stuntmen to pay the bills, with Maggie hilariously acting as his on-set coach. But their unique and offbeat family is threatened when Maggie's mother shows up out of the blue, and Valentin realizes he's in danger of losing his daughter - and his best friend.

programme.title: Wrong
programme.desc: Dolph Springer wakes up one morning to realize he has lost the love of his life, his dog, Paul. During his quest to get Paul (and his life) back, Dolph radically changes the lives of others. In his journey to find Paul, Dolph may lose something even more vital – his mind.

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: 'Greener Grass' is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylised absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite. Writers, directors and stars Jocelyn DeBoer and Dawn Luebbe have created a unique comedy that is destined to be a cult classic. "It's like Wes Anderson taking on a Black Mirror instalment...or David Lynch suddenly directing an episode of Desperate Housewives" - Indiewire

programme.title: North
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old North (Elijah Wood, The Lord of the Rings trilogy) realizes that his parents (Jason Alexander and Julia Louis-Dreyfus, TV's “Seinfeld”) never pay attention to him. After talking to a wise man in an Easter Bunny suit (Bruce Willis, Die Hard), North comes up with the idea of becoming a free agent. After winning a court case, North is given two months to find new parents, leading to an amazing, hilarious adventure. Featuring an all-star cast including Dan Aykroyd, Alan Arkin, Kathy Bates, Jon Lovitz, John Ritter and, in her first-ever role, Scarlett Johansson, NORTH is a comedy unlike any other.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: From director Wes Anderson comes his adaptation of beloved children's author Roald Dahl's novel about a fox battling angry farmers. Mr. and Mrs. Fox live an idyllic home life but after twelve years of quiet domesticity, the bucolic existence proves too much for Mr. Fox's wild animal instincts. Soon he slips back into his old ways as a sneaky chicken thief and in doing so, endangers not only his beloved family, but the whole animal community.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: After the disappearance of a young scientist on a business trip, his son and wife struggle to cope, only to make a bizarre discovery years later - one that may bring him home.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of It
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few and showcases a wealth of behind-the-scenes footage and photos seen by even fewer. From investigating the cultural phenomenon of coulrophobia (the fear of clowns) to Tim Curry's magical portrayal of the notorious clown monster, this story promises to dig deeper into the Pennywise phenomenon than ever before! Featuring interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Tim Curry, Seth Green, and Richard Thomas.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.sub-title: Broken on the Wheel of Love
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.
