programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: We Die Young
programme.desc: Sudden Death meets Sicario in this gritty thriller starring action legend Jean Claud Van Damme. When a ruthless drug lord recruits a 10-year-old boy, his older brother is desperate to keep him safe and flees for their lives.

programme.title: Tom's Midnight Garden
programme.desc: A young boy journeys across the boundaries of reality to a secret, haunted place, half-a-century back in time, in this tale of enchantment, shadows and lost memories.

programme.title: Red Dog
programme.desc: The story of a legendary, lovable red dog who roamed the outback looking for his original master

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Mexico, two very different women become a bank robbery duo to fight a ruthless enforcer terrorizing their city.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray
programme.desc: In the prison of the supposedly most dangerous men, a soldier develops an odd friendship

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: When 2 of the 3 things a fortune teller predicts come true, Ali wonders about the 3rd - finding true love with a man named John. Drawn to a fireman whose name isn't John, does she trust destiny or her heart?

programme.title: Mary 4 Mayor
programme.desc: Running for mayor against her incumbent mayor father, an eighteen-year-old young woman learns valuable life lessons that not only are the building blocks to saving her family, but also the town she lives in.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: $100,000 for a Killing
programme.desc: $100,000 for a Killing - Johnny Forest, bounty hunter, attempts to carry out his mother's dying wish that he bring in his outlaw brother, Clint, alive.

programme.title: Incredible Rocky Mountain Race
programme.desc: An old man observes a boy bullying his playmates and treats him to a morality lesson. The man tells the story of the epic cross-country race between a young Mark Twain and his rival, Mike Fink.

programme.title: Cattle Queen of Montana
programme.desc: Sierra Nevada Jones must fight a villainous rancher to regain the land that is rightfully hers.

programme.title: Renegade Girl
programme.desc: Ann Shelby, whose family is allied with the notorious William Quantrill, turns outlaw to revenge herself on a renegade Indian who killed her brother.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Lazar, a bounty killer, teams up with a young gunfighter to blackmail Barrett, a former bandit and mine owner. At the end of the day, the bounty hunter clashes with Barrett, but something goes wrong.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Thomas and Robin are ready to spend the rest of their lives together, and nothing will stop their wedding from happening. Not even overprotective feuding mothers and a mischievous teenage sister.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Eugene Onegin is a jaded and disaffected young man who leaves St. Petersburg unexpectedly when he inherits an estate from a wealthy uncle. Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Liv Tyler, Toby Stephens, Lena Headey, Simon McBurney, Jason Watkins

programme.title: Back To Love
programme.desc: A young widow returns home for the first time in three years to help prepare her sister's wedding. She is forced to confront her past, including the man she never expected to fall for.

programme.title: Kill Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: When Julie's husband dies, she moves cross-country to rebuild her life with son Matty and build a closer relationship with her late husband's sister, Alison. Yet Alison blames Julie for her brother's death and has a plan to become Matty's mother...no matter who gets hurt in the process.

programme.title: Staged Killer
programme.desc: When a former co-host, Jake Everett, works his way back into the professional life of popular TV morning show host Naomi Spencer, the show's success skyrockets, but Naomi's personal life begins to fall apart. Naomi Spencer is a popular local television morning talk show host. AKA Good Morning Murder

programme.title: Pele: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: The amazing story of Pele's meteoric rise from the slums of Sao Paulo to World Cup victory.

programme.title: Venus
programme.desc: A family comedy about a transitioning woman who discovers that she's the father of a 14 year old boy.

programme.title: Viridiana
programme.desc: Viridiana, a young nun about to take her final vows, pays a visit to her widowed uncle at the request of her Mother Superior. Regarded by many as Buuels crowning achievement while the Spanish government suppressed the film on the grounds of blasphemy and obscenity. A despairing picture of the dark cavern of the human heart.

programme.title: Voyage To The Planet Of Prehistoric Women
programme.desc: Astronauts landing on Venus encounter dangerous creatures and almost meet some sexy Venusian women who like to sun-bathe in hip-hugging skin-tight pants and seashell brassieres.

programme.title: Voyage To The Prehistoric Planet
programme.desc: In 2020, after the colonization of the moon, the spaceships Vega, Sirius and Capella are launched from Lunar Station 7. They are to explore Venus under the command of Professor Hartman, but an asteroid collides and explodes Capella.

programme.title: Wake Me Up When The War Is Over
programme.desc: During the final months of WW2, a lonely German Baroness hides an attractive American airman in her mansion for long time without telling him the war has been over for almost five years.

programme.title: Ways Of Love
programme.desc: In the first episode, a heartbroken woman talks to her ex-lover on the phone. In the second, a pregnant woman believes she is carrying the child of Saint Joseph.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: THE DARKEST HOUR is the story of five young people who find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack. The 3D thriller highlights the classic beauty of Moscow alongside mind-blowing special effects from the minds of visionary filmmaker Timur Bekmambetov (Wanted, Night Watch) and director Chris Gorak.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: Ten thousand days ago, Comet 23 struck Earth with the magnitude of all the nuclear weapons in the world sending the planet into a deep freeze. Now, 27 years in the future, those who survived are locked in an epic battle of life or death.

programme.title: Plurality
programme.desc: Plurality is an action-packed whodunnit cyber thriller. After a bizarre bus accident, Ming Ze awakens from a coma to discover that his mind now shares the consciousness of four fellow passengers - all of them dead all of them suspects in a serial kidnapping and murder case. To prove his own innocence, Ming evades capture by the police and tries to track down the killer's only surviving victim. But in order to unmask the murderer's true identity, Ming must first fight the monster within himself.

programme.title: Against the Wild: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog must use all their skills to survive in the African bush after a plane crash.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: Anatomy of Deception
programme.desc: A district attorney who, tapped to replace the outgoing mayor, is stalked by a man who engineers her fall from grace, leading her to push back and beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Seduced by Lies
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman is relieved to move on from her obsessive ex when she meets a handsome oil heir. However, romance gives way to suspicion when she discovers someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley Albright (LINDSAY LOHAN) is the luckiest woman in the world, a person to whom all the good things in life have come far too easily. She can pick a lottery ticket at random and hit the jackpot. In New York, the world's busiest city, Ashley never has to wait for a cab. And she has a terrific job as an account exec at a prestigious public relations firm. Everything goes Ashley's way. And now, she's been given a great opportunity to advance her career: she is to plan a masquerade ball in downtown Manhattan for record mogul Damon Phillips (Faizon Love) and his company.

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: When Charlotte and Brandon meet, they rush into marriage after failing in previous relationships. Then they discover who they've vowed to spend the rest of their lives with for better or worse.

programme.title: Standing Up for Sunny
programme.desc: An isolated guy with cerebral palsy is railroaded into helping an unassertive comedienne, and finds love and acceptance through stand up comedy.

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of the self-help book, 'The Secret', which focuses on the power of positive thinking

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
programme.desc: Two Czechs prepare for a suicide mission to assassinate the hideous mastermind behind the "Final Solution".

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: Jumanji meets The Mummy in this edge-of-your-seat action thriller, starring Kelsey Grammer (X-Men), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Bingbing Li (Transformers). In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, battling Chinese magic and flesh-eating spiders, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: David & Goliath
programme.desc: Expect bloodshed, epic action sequences and sheer fearlessness, in the greatest story ever told! At the crossroads of two great ancient empires, a innocent shepherd named David transforms into a powerful warrior and takes on a terrifyingly violent giant named Goliath. One of history's most legendary Biblical battles is retold in a stylistic, bloody tale of courage and faith.

programme.title: The Ledge
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat survival thriller starring Brittany Ashworth (Hostile) and Ben Lamb (Divergent). When Kelly captures the murder of her best friend on camera while on a rock climbing trip, she becomes the next target of a group of friends who will stop at nothing to destroy the evidence. Kelly finds herself in a free-climbing chase up a freezing mountain, pursued by the group of murderous men.

programme.title: The Reef: Stalked
programme.desc: After Nic and Annie witness the horrific murder of their sister, they try to escape the trauma by traveling to a remote Pacific Island for a kayaking adventure. But within hours of arriving, the women are attacked far from land by a great white shark. Bleeding, vulnerable and with their lives at stake, its a fight for survival when they realise that theyre being stalked by the deadly beast.

programme.title: Glasshouse
programme.desc: Glasshouse is an original, haunting, and sexy sci-fi thriller, which stars Jessica Alexander (A Banquet), Hilton Pelser (The Kissing Booth trilogy) and Adrienne Pearce. Whilst a memory-erasing virus permeates the atmosphere - like airborne dementia, a family secures safety within an airtight glasshouse until a stranger disrupts their peace and stirs up a past best left buried.

programme.title: A Focus To Kill
programme.desc: A woman is hired by her ex-boyfriend to manage his fortune. After an affair, she is forced to confront the fact that he may not be the man he once was. Starring Presciliana Esparolini (2018)

programme.title: Deadly BandB
programme.desc: A woman opens her dream bed-and-breakfast in a recently restored home, but the arrival of a dangerous guest quickly disturbs the peace. Stars Angie Patterson Muto and Chad Michael Collins (2018)

programme.title: Stranger In The House
programme.desc: A woman suspects her new stepmother of killing her father. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier (2016)

programme.title: Cradles For Cash
programme.desc: Two victims of baby abduction join forces to take down an illegal adoption ring. Starring Adrienne Frantz (2019)

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Callie dreads family dinners as her parents pressure her to find a partner. Help is in the form of Will, her brother's colleague, who will pose as her date. Will her parents be fooled? (2020)

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A relationship columnist is tasked with creating a love map showing Florida's undiscovered romantic locations. Will the romantic nature of the assignment be ruined by a prickly tour guide? (2021)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: Love Afloat
programme.desc: Lorelei travels to the Caribbean after inheriting a sailboat from her late uncle.

programme.title: The Walk
programme.desc: The true story of French high-wire artist Philippe Petit's walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center on August 7, 1974.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munros 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time. Will Salas lives minute-to-minute, until a windfall of time gives him access to the world of the wealthy, where he teams up with a beautiful young heiress to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: In the real-time, high stakes thriller, George Clooney and Julia Roberts star as financial TV host Lee Gates and his producer Patty, who are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything (Jack O'Connell) forcefully takes over their studio. During a tense standoff broadcast to millions on live TV, Lee and Patty must work furiously against the clock to unravel the mystery behind a conspiracy at the heart of today's fast-paced, high-tech global markets.

programme.title: Armed And Dangerous
programme.desc: Candy is a former police officer who lost his job when he was framed. Levy is a former attorney who has been disbarred for incompetence. Faced with unemployment, both men take jobs as guards for a security company where, after two hours' training, but their employer is frightened of Loggia, the union mob boss who seems to have everyone under his control.

programme.title: Blankman
programme.desc: He has no superpowers, no money and no name. He's Blankman, a self-appointed neighborhood crimestopper who's so broke that he fights crime in his underware. Television's Damon Wayans stars as the bumbling Blankman in this uproarious laughfest.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: From the director of Sleepless in Seattle, the endearingly off-center employees of a suicide hotline hope for a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Buddy
programme.desc: An eccentric 1920s socialite raises a baby gorilla as her own child.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An unemployed actor with a reputation for being difficult disguises himself as a woman to get a role in a soap opera.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny (Robert Reed, TV's “The Brady Bunch”) and Mickey Lubitch (Diana Hyland, TV's “Peyton Place”) learn that their son, Tod (Travolta), is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world. Despite being sheltered from society, Tod remains optimistic about life, even developing a relationship with his neighbor, Gina (Glynnis O'Connor, Johnny Dangerously). But all Tod hopes for is to get outside and experience what others take for granted.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares. After a fateful encounter with a curious stranger who claims to recognize her, Rebecca's memory is jolted when she sees a picture of herself and her three children. Armed with only the photo, the location of a small town, and the name Chase Stewart, Rebecca sets out to find some answers. Refusing to be intimidated by Stewart's threats and schemes, Rebecca slowly but surely uncovers the facts that allow her to reclaim her children and her past.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: For lovers of Harry Potter, Magic Beyond Words is a must see movie. An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up. It takes all their love for each other to find a way through to redemption and recognition.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love. Oscar® winner Brie Larson brings Jeannette Walls's best-selling memoir to life as a young woman who, influenced by the joyfully wild nature of her deeply dysfunctional father (Woody Harrelson), found the fiery determination to carve out a successful life on her own terms.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: A classic comedy with big name stars and lots of cool cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all star cast in this ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run. A bunch of people in souped-up cars, some disguised, vie for the title of 'Winner' and they'll do anything to get it. Never before has such an amazing array of talent been assembled for one film. We're treated to the combined acting prowess of Roger Moore, Farrah Fawcett, Dom DeLuise, Dean Martin, Sammy Davis Jnr, Jackie Chan, Peter Fonda, Bianca Jagger and the one and only Burt Reynolds.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: During the warring period of the three kingdoms, ancient China is in turmoil. To unify the country general Cao Cao (Jiang Wen), enlists the aid of the greatest warrior in the land Guan Yun Change (Donnie Yen). However, Guan Yun Chang is a loyal friend of Cao Cao's enemy Liu Bei. To persuade the peerless warrior to fight, Cao Cao takes his beloved Qi Lan (Sun Li) hostage.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live action movie-length version of the famous four, The Evil Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem and kidnaps the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's Anti Mutant antidote and, with the help of a journalist, embark on an adventure to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet's biggest biomass migration, as billions of sardines migrate along South Africa's east coast, each hoping to escape the jaws of hungry predators.

programme.title: Shark Squad: Island of the White Shark
programme.desc: Off Guadalupe Island in the Pacific Ocean, leading shark ecologist Mauricio Hoyos attempts a television first as he attaches a camera to the dorsal fin of a great white.

programme.title: Beasts of The Big Blue: Tini Heke / Snares Islands
programme.desc: Explores the Snare Islands, located in the Southern Ocean, where penguins and other seabirds reside.

programme.title: Ningaloo: Australia's Ocean Wonder: Collisions
programme.desc: An exploration of the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf, with Tim Winton, Traditional Owners, and other experts.

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: Counts down some of the most incredible, spectacular and hilarious real life crashes in the world. Video cameras capture massive pile ups, road rage and misguided overtaking manoeuvres.

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer: Kicked to Death
programme.desc: In May 2001, a gang of youths brutally attacked a pair of brothers, leading to the death of Christopher Donovan and a meticulous police investigation that convicted three of its members.

programme.title: Britcam: Emergency on our Streets
programme.desc: Bailiffs Ben and Debbie go door knocking in Worthing, while police officers Matt and Tony feel the pressure when they find themselves battling to clear a burning building.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and Summer volunteer their time when cutbacks put the Baywatch lifeguards' jobs in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie spends a week with the Coast Guard to help them crack a dangerous arms smuggling ring.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt doesn't know whose story to believe when he tries to reunite a runaway teen and her father.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer desperate for a new TV series idea observes a Baywatch rescue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a minor earthquake, a geological survey team arrives at Baywatch, but trouble strikes again.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After the earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Northern fleet are not going down without a fight, but the Southern fleet battles on to keep the lead. Some boats are taking risks and changing tactics, because they know that all it will take is one good sized fish to shake up the leader board.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Most of the crews of the fleet are getting desperate and are willing to try anything to catch the fish necessary to put them at the top of the leader board, but Reel E Bugging reckon they have it in the bag. One fish could make all the difference and a little bit of luck goes a long way.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Being away from home for extended periods of time, the crews are all feeling a little homesick, but at the back of everyone's mind is that they are doing what they do, to support those loved ones, and they need to take advantage of every last bit of quota to make that happen.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With yet another storm moving in, and the quota dwindling before their eyes, Captains are realising that the season could end before they achieve their objectives. The decision to stay out fishing or run from the storm always needs to be a balance between safety and reward.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Mistakes and mechanical issues start to wear down the northern and southern fleets. Kahuna tries to catch up after boat repairs that keep Captain Reed Meredith and his crew off the water. Reel E Bugging Captain Bobby Earl navigates one setback after another in order to extend a hard earned lead. Meanwhile, Pinwheel hopes to catch quickly in order to push ahead of the leading southern boats before the quota closes.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: When one last extension is added to the quota, the competition gets tighter than ever. Its a game of leapfrog on the leader board, as every boat races to secure their last few paychecks before the season closes. With big bluefin being caught, everyone knows the limit will be full in the blink of an eye, but the real question is whose catch will be enough to take the top spot?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: JudgAll season long the bluefin battle between Northern and Southern boats has raged and the final two days of the season will be no different. A championship title is on the line, along with final paychecks and local reputations. Southern boats are in the lead, but Northerners, Pinwheel and Hot Tuna will not stop their pursuit of the title and desire to topple the Southern fleet. In the end it all comes down to one final giant bluefin tuna.e Frank Caprio takes an empathetic approach to a variety of traffic, parking and other violations.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Opening day of winter bluefin tuna season in the Outer Banks. FV-Tuna.Com joins the Southern fleet for the first time. With the return of top-boats Fishin Frenzy, Reel E Bugging, Hot Tuna and Pinwheel everyone is fishing for success.

programme.title: PRIDE

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.sub-title: Imire Rhino and Wild Life Conservancy
programme.desc: Kristina visits Imire Rhino and Wildlife Conservancy where she is shown around by the founder's grandson, Riley. She has the opportunity to learn about and interact with elephants that have been trained to track poachers. They track a black rhino and her calf on foot and Riley puts her skills as an anti-poacher to the test.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The adventure continues as Kristina journeys to Far and Wide in mountainous Nyanga, Eastern Zimbabwe. Her guide Bernie begins the trip with some extreme adventure sports including braving the tallest zip line on the planet. She tackles obstacle courses, is taught wilderness survival skills and heads to a nearby reserve to photograph diverse animal species for her personal wildlife calendar.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina visits Thetford Estate where she's treated to amazing photographic opportunities for her personal calendar. Her guide, Craig Coid, gets her closer to white rhino than she ever imagined and takes her way back in time as he tells stories revealed by detailed rock paintings.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the infamous tiger fish. The shoreline sights never disappoint as she witnesses lion and fish eagles on the hunt. Kristina challenges her fishing guide, Dollar, to a fishing competition and lands her biggest fish yet!

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman heads to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to the Mana Pools National Park with guide Craig van Zyl. They come across mating lions, have close encounters with bull elephants and canoe just meters away from imposing hippos and crocodiles on the mighty Zambezi River.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first-ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina gets to tick off one of her bucket list dreams – the majestic Victoria Falls. Her guide Beano walks her through the history of the falls formation and they encounter some of the wildlife that live in the surrounding area. She zip-lines across the gorge and learns the integral role vultures play in the ecosystem.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still at Victoria Falls, Kristina is treated to an aerial view of the Victoria falls. She gets up close and personal with prehistoric-looking beasts at the croc sanctuary, experiences some of the must-do tourist activities and has her first-ever encounter with endangered black rhino at the Stanley and Livingstone Private Game Reserve.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Guided by Sean, Kristina explores the Matusadona National Park where they have incredible on-foot encounters with elephants and lions. Will she keep her cool as she comes face-to-face with one of Africa's apex predators?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina remains at Changa where she is treated to game-viewing by helicopter, tries her hand at fishing and witnesses lions stalking buffalo.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Pamuzinda Safari Lodge is only one and a half hours from the capital - Harare. With Lawrence as her guide, Kristina embarks on an entertaining horse-back safari, interacts with Jasmine the giraffe, has a relaxing canoe trip and meets the clever resident elephant herd.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.sub-title: Imire Rhino and Wild Life Conservancy
programme.desc: Kristina visits Imire Rhino and Wildlife Conservancy where she is shown around by the founder's grandson, Riley. She has the opportunity to learn about and interact with elephants that have been trained to track poachers. They track a black rhino and her calf on foot and Riley puts her skills as an anti-poacher to the test.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The adventure continues as Kristina journeys to Far and Wide in mountainous Nyanga, Eastern Zimbabwe. Her guide Bernie begins the trip with some extreme adventure sports including braving the tallest zip line on the planet. She tackles obstacle courses, is taught wilderness survival skills and heads to a nearby reserve to photograph diverse animal species for her personal wildlife calendar.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina visits Thetford Estate where she's treated to amazing photographic opportunities for her personal calendar. Her guide, Craig Coid, gets her closer to white rhino than she ever imagined and takes her way back in time as he tells stories revealed by detailed rock paintings.

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.sub-title: Of Fairy Penguins and GPS Trackers
programme.desc: Australia's largest fur seal colony is located on Phillip Island. Night after night, a breathtaking spectacle takes place here: At sunset, countless fairy penguins return from their hunt for fish. In the station near the penguin colony, pioneering scientific research is conducted around the cute animals. We learn how dedicated scientists are trying to secure the future of the fairy penguins with the help of GPS trackers.

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.sub-title: Of Sea Turtles and Coral Reefs
programme.desc: The Cairns Turtle Rehabilitation Center (CTRC) raises and cares for sick, or injured turtles, while the Schmidt Ocean Institute goes on a diving mission with a high-tech underwater rover. In this way, we learn firsthand about the state of Australia's sensitive marine animals' natural habitat and what needs to be done to ensure their survival.

programme.title: Realm of the robber
programme.desc: Thievery and treachery are second nature for the world's largest land crab. This documentary explores the untold story of Christmas Island's iconic robber crabs. Armed with claws that deliver more force than a lion's bite, they can grow a metre across and are relentless in their search for food. However, the brash crustaceans have surprisingly complex private lives and often find themselves in precarious situations, whether escaping from frenzied ants or risking their life to deposit fertilised eggs into a raging ocean. To tell the story of the robber crab's life cycle, directors Moritz Katz and Braydon Moloney spent a year in the field, following their subjects in minute detail. The tragedies, trials and triumphs paint a fresh, humorous portrait of Christmas Island and its nefarious denizens.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The contours of the Mediterranean have changed during the course of its history. Near Gibraltar, Africa was once connected to the European continent. When the land bridge at Gibraltar collapsed, the Mediterranean basin filled up again. The Suez Canal is today connected to the Red Sea. This route enables animals to reach the Mediterranean, where they cause problems.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Rugged rocks, blue sea and idyllic, sandy beaches - this is the Mediterranean as we know it. But this impression is deceptive: the Mediterranean is under constant change. The continents are moving towards one another. Animals, that have to survive under such extreme conditions, must find a way to escape the dangers. Between deserts and volcanoes, the challenges for the animals are enormous.

programme.title: Secrets of the North Sea
programme.desc: The North Sea is enigmatic. It presents itself in cool shades of grey. Yet who would have guessed that beneath the chilly waves are opulent coral gardens, courting squids, and several of the largest sea creatures on the planet?

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 3, Lithuania
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).
